channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us

item.title: Heavy snow and numbing temperatures keep parts of the US in a deep freeze
item.description: LOWVILLE, N.Y. (AP) — Heavy snowfall and numbing temperatures kept parts of the U.S. in a deep freeze Sunday as the Thanksgiving holiday weekend drew to a close. Some snowmobilers and skiers reveled in the wintry conditions, while flinty fans prepared for the NFL game in Buffalo.
item.dc:creator: CARA ANNA and CAROLYN THOMPSON, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Family of pilot who died on an animal rescue flight to receive remains of dog killed in crash
item.description: The ashes of a big-eyed, brown and white puppy named Lisa that died last week in a plane crash in New York's Catskill Mountains were being delivered Sunday to the family of the animal rescue pilot who lost his life trying to give the dog a chance at a new one.
item.dc:creator: SUSAN HAIGH, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: New concrete formula could be key to fixing the roads: Michigan researchers
item.description: A team of researchers at Michigan State University claim this new type of concrete is “flexible, self-heating and self-healing.
item.dc:creator: Matt Jaworowski, KRON4

item.title: Heavy snow and numbing temperatures keep parts of the US in a deep freeze
item.description: Heavy snowfall and numbing temperatures kept parts of the U.S. in a deep freeze Sunday as the Thanksgiving holiday weekend draws to a close.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: What the cost-of-living adjustment increase in Social Security means
item.description: A 2.5% cost-of-living adjustment increase will mean an extra $50 a month for most Social Security and SSI recipients.
item.dc:creator: Jeff Arnold, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Martha Stewart's anger at James Comey for making her 'trophy' criminal is 'understandable,' attorney says
item.description: Martha Stewart said then-U.S. Attorney James Comey and other prosecutors used her as a "trophy" during her criminal trial in 2004 in the new Netflix documentary, "Martha.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Hamas releases new hostage video of American-Israeli Edan Alexander
item.description: Hamas released a propaganda video Saturday showing the 20-year-old Alexander alive, marking his first proof of life since being kidnapped.
item.dc:creator: Mills Hayes, NewsNation

item.title: Video captures Connecticut home engulfed in flames on Thanksgiving as turkey fried in garage: fire department
item.description: A massive house fire in Connecticut that took 16 hours to extinguish may have been caused by someone frying a turkey inside the garage on Thanksgiving Day.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Ohio State, Michigan players involved in melee after Buckeyes loss, multiple people pepper sprayed
item.description: COLUMBUS, Ohio (WCMH) — Michigan players planted their team flag at midfield of Ohio Stadium on Saturday afternoon after a 13-10 win over No. 2 Ohio State, leading to a brawl between players from both teams with police attempting to separate the sides and pepper spray being used.
item.dc:creator: Orri Benatar, Fox 5

item.title: Gaetz saga moves toward final act in House
item.description: Former Rep. Matt Gaetz’s (R-Fla.) time in Congress may be over, but the saga over the House Ethics Committee’s report on its years-long investigation into him is in its final act.
item.dc:creator: Emily Brooks, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Truck carrying 44,000 pounds of dried chickpeas catches fire in Death Valley National Park
item.description: A truck carrying 44,000 pounds of dried chickpeas caught fire in Death Valley National Park, according to the National Park Service.
item.dc:creator: Linsey Lewis, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Hidden gems of early Cyber Monday deals
item.description: BestReviews has assembled a collection of top-quality gifts priced under $50, currently available at discounts of up to 60% off.
item.dc:creator: Lizzy Briskin, ABC 4

item.title: Alabama A&M player Medrick Burnett Jr. dies following injury during game
item.description: BIRMINGHAM, Ala. (WIAT) — Medrick Burnett Jr., a 20-year-old football player for Alabama A&M University, died Wednesday a month after sustaining a serious injury during a football game. Burnett Jr., a linebacker who was injured during the Magic City Classic on Oct.
item.dc:creator: Drew Taylor, Fox 5

item.title: GOP senator: Americans don’t care about FBI background checks for Trump nominees
item.description: Sen. Bill Hagerty (R-Tenn.), who was rumored to be on Trump’s shortlist to serve as Treasury secretary, said most Americans “don’t care” whether Trump uses the FBI to vet his nominees, something fellow Republican senators have demanded.
item.dc:creator: Alexander Bolton, NewsNation

item.title: DNA test brings NY father, daughter together after nearly 50 years
item.description: Thanksgiving is more than a tradition – it's a time for loved ones and families to get together, to embrace and give thanks for all that is good in their lives.
item.dc:creator: Marvin Scott, Fox 5

item.title: Venezuelan gang members linked to violent apartment takeover arrested in New York City
item.description: Tren de Aragua members Denyeer Aramillo Meneses, 23, and Edison Pena Angulo, 25, were arrested in the Bronx. Both were pictured in a viral video of a Colorado armed break in.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Black Friday smart TVs are cheaper than ever — Samsung, LG and more
item.description: BestReviews keeps track of all sorts of deals on your favorite products, including electronics and TVs. If you’re looking for the best early Black Friday TV deals, keep this article handy as we’ll continue to update it with the latest discounts.
item.dc:creator: Jmar Gambol, Fox 5

item.title: Cryptocurrency entrepreneur who bought banana art for $6.2 million eats the fruit in Hong Kong
item.description: HONG KONG (AP) — A cryptocurrency entrepreneur who bought a piece of conceptual art consisting of a simple banana, duct-taped to a wall, for $6.2 million last week ate the fruit in Hong Kong on Friday.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Child's toes 'severed' by lawnmower at Utah daycare; state wants it to shut down
item.description: A childcare center in southern Utah is losing its license and must cease operations by Dec. 4 after a child's toes were "severed" by a lawnmower.
item.dc:creator: Trevor Myers, KRON4

item.title: Sean 'Diddy' Combs denied bail for a third time
item.description: He was denied bail in September and earlier this month when the judge deemed Combs a flight risk because of his money and connections.
item.dc:creator: Katie Smith, ABC 4

item.title: Sean 'Diddy' Combs denied bail a third time as he awaits sex trafficking trial
item.description: Sean “Diddy” Combs has been denied bail as he awaits a May sex trafficking trial. U.S. District Judge Arun Subramanian made the decision in a written ruling Wednesday. The decision follows a bail hearing last week.
item.dc:creator: LARRY NEUMEISTER, WFLA, NBC

item.title: 3 killed, 1 seriously injured in Tesla Cybertruck crash in Northern California
item.description: PIEDMONT, Calif. (AP) — Three people were killed and one seriously injured early Wednesday when a Tesla Cybertruck crashed and caught fire in Northern California, officials said.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Oregon tribe has hunting and fishing rights restored under a long-sought court ruling
item.description: LINCOLN CITY, Ore. (AP) — Drumming made the floor vibrate and singing filled the conference room of the Chinook Winds Casino Resort in Lincoln City, on the Oregon coast, as hundreds in tribal regalia danced in a circle.
item.dc:creator: CLAIRE RUSH, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Trump nominees targeted in series of threats, spokesperson says
item.description: (The Hill) - Multiple nominees and appointees tapped to serve in President-elect Trump’s incoming administration were targeted with threats this week, a spokesperson for the transition said Wednesday, though it was unclear how many were affected.
item.dc:creator: Brett Samuels, ABC 4

item.title: Macy's Thanksgiving Day Parade in NYC: See the balloons inflate before the big day
item.description: The 98th annual Macy’s Thanksgiving Day Parade will take over Manhattan Thursday morning, lining the streets with extravagant balloons and fanfare.
item.dc:creator: Emily Rahhal, WFLA, NBC

item.title: California man arrested for allegedly smuggling meth-caked clothing through LAX
item.description: Authorities found more than a dozen clothing items, including a cow pajama onesie, that were dried stiff and covered in a white residue.
item.dc:creator: Vivian Chow, Fox 5

item.title: 3 Americans held for years in China have been released, White House says
item.description: Three American citizens imprisoned for years by China have been released and are returning to the United States, the White House said Wednesday, announcing a rare diplomatic agreement with Beijing in the final months of the Biden administration.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Disney agrees to $43 million settlement in gender pay lawsuit
item.description: The agreement settles allegations initially made in a 2019 lawsuit filed by Disney employee LaRonda Rasmussen, who claimed she was getting paid less than her male counterparts in the same role.
item.dc:creator: Sarah Fortinsky, Fox 5

item.title: Fired workers blamed for knocking over 120 headstones at Tennessee cemetery
item.description: More than 120 headstones at a Tennessee cemetery were knocked over by freshly fired employees, according to the cemetery's owner.
item.dc:creator: Shay Arthur, ABC 4

item.title: Fugitive on FBI's 'Most Wanted Terrorist' list captured after more than 20 years on run
item.description: Daniel Andreas San Diego, a fugitive on the FBI’s “Most Wanted Terrorist” list, was captured in the United Kingdom on Monday after more than 20 years.
item.dc:creator: Filip Timotija, Fox 5

item.title: Rudy Giuliani draws rebuke for a courtroom outburst accusing judge in assets case of being unfair
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — In an angry outburst in a New York courtroom, Rudy Giuliani accused a judge Tuesday of making wrong assumptions about him as he tries to comply with an order requiring him to turn over most of his assets to two election poll workers who won a libel case against him. U.S.
item.dc:creator: LARRY NEUMEISTER, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Trump's threat to impose tariffs could raise prices for consumers, colliding with promise for relief
item.description: DETROIT (AP) — If Donald Trump makes good on his threat to slap 25% tariffs on everything imported from Mexico and Canada, the price increases that could follow will collide with his campaign promise to give American families a break from inflation.
item.dc:creator: TOM KRISHER and CHRISTOPHER RUGABER, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Biden proposes Medicare and Medicaid cover costly weight-loss drugs for millions of obese Americans
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — Millions of Americans with obesity would be eligible to have popular weight-loss drugs like Wegovy or Zepbound covered by Medicare or Medicaid under a new rule the Biden administration proposed Tuesday morning. The costly proposal from the U.S.
item.dc:creator: AMANDA SEITZ, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Tank explodes, catches fire near GM facility in Michigan
item.description: A tank containing byproducts from oil drilling operations exploded and caught fire Tuesday near the General Motors Proving Ground in southeastern Michigan, damaging two nearby homes but causing no injuries, a fire chief said.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: HIV-positive organ transplants allowed under new rule
item.description: People with HIV will soon be permitted to receive transplanted kidneys and livers from donors who are also infected with the virus under a new rule approved by the Biden administration.
item.dc:creator: Sarah Fortinsky, Fox 5
